$comment: S-P0-03/T01b (W-76) coverage RATCHET. floor = current measured lines% rounded DOWN to 1%. Raise floors each cluster — never lower without an ADR. metric = lines. S-P0-03/T01d-hotfix (ADR-057): coverage basis ĐỔI = SOURCE-only — vitest coverage exclude '**/*.spec.ts' (giữ all:true) → thêm test KHÔNG làm tụt gate (nghịch lý T02a). Re-based số honest trên CI conditions (ci-min seed): gateway floor 43→42 (source-only WITH-DB CI = 42.72%; KHÔNG phải hạ gate — đổi basis từ with-spec 43.8% sang source-only, spec files cover cao hơn src nên % giảm; ADR-057). workers 10 (source-only 10.79%); web 53 UNCHANGED (components+lib include không gồm spec — đã source-only). gateway checked in CI `integration-db`; web/workers in no-DB `test` job.
